observations.observation: Claude Code auto-routes based on agent description ~80% of the time; explicit user direction needed for the rest
observations.actionable: Consider adding explicit routing hooks in settings.json for guaranteed enforcement

observations.observation: Gemini Flash is ~30x cheaper than Claude Sonnet for equivalent token counts on mechanical tasks
observations.actionable: Verify with actual measured costs once session-log.jsonl has data

observations.observation: For Claude Code Max plan subscribers, per-token savings matter less within plan limits; delegation is primarily valuable for rate limit extension and parallelism
observations.actionable: Surface this in README as a nuance — not all users benefit equally from cost routing

observations.observation: Agent descriptions written as IF/WHEN trigger predicates with explicit exclusion clauses are hypothesized to reduce routing ambiguity from ~80% to 95%+; routing failures concentrate on boundary cases where two agents have overlapping capability descriptions.
observations.actionable: Rewrite agent description fields using 'Invoke WHEN: [conditions] / Do NOT invoke for: [exclusions]' syntax; add routing-decision logging; run 20-task boundary eval to measure delta.
